title: The Price for Silence
overview: After the death of her father, a troubled woman returns home to confront the family who paid for her silence.  Kira Flynn grew up in a storybook NJ setting.  As a teen, she was a gifted artist with a bright future ahead of her, until one fateful night changed everything; a child’s innocence, a father’s loyalty, and a family’s future.  Fifteen years later, Kira’s father passes away.  She returns home to her mother, Sheila, and her brother,  Lucas, to help bury her father while she digs up her past.
